(Moon). The Shukra (Venus) is considered auspicious and
powerful if C. occupies its own house which is either one of the Kendras
or one of the Trines. The gain in strength is very considerable if the
Shukra (Venus) rvles a Kendra and a Trine and at the same time occupies
one of them. The Shukra (Venus) is deemed strong if it is in its exaltation
anywhere in the horoscope. The Shukra (Venus) is very strong if it is in
ts exaltation in a Kendra or in a Trine. It gets fortified if it is fully aspected
by its dispositor. A Benefic by its full aspect upgrades the Venus. The
gain in strength by the Shukra (Venus) is considerable if the Benefic
aspecting the Shukra (Venus) fully is in its own hCXJse or if it is in its sign
of exakation. The gain in strength by the Shukra {Venus) rules one of
the Trines. besides being in its own house or in its sign of exaltation. The
Shukla (Venus) is also suengthened if it is fully aspected by a Malefic
